name: agent-builder-platform
description: Monorepo: agent design -> run -> package lifecycle. Local-first by default.

scripts.test:studio: cd apps/agent-studio && npm run test:roundtrip && npm run test:no-hardcoded-storage
scripts.test: npm run test:packages && npm run test:agent-builder && npm run test:chief-of-staff && npm run test:studio
scripts.test:live: npm run test && npm run test:studio:live
